name: TeeUp
about: TeeUp is a premier indoor golf and axe throwing venue located in Waverly, Iowa. The facility features two state-of-the-art golf simulators with 12x10 ft screens, equipped with top-of-the-line technology to provide an immersive experience for golfers of all ages and skill levels. Alongside the golf simulators, ChillAxe offers axe throwing with three private lanes featuring various targets, electronic scorekeeping, and a variety of games. Pricing is simple at $45 per hour per bay for golf, with rental clubs available for $5. The venue also serves beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic drinks, and allows customers to bring in their own food.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulators with in-depth shot analysis technology
Simple hourly pricing model not based on the number of people
Variety of activities including leagues, mini-games, and special events
Includes a 17-foot putting green and driving ranges for year-round practice

food_and_drink.notes: Customers are allowed to bring in their own food.
Offers a wide selection of beer, seltzers, and non-alcoholic drinks.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No clubs? No problem! Rental clubs are available for $5.00.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Customers are allowed to bring in food, but drinks must be purchased from ChillAxe.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers leagues and activities suitable for players of all ages and skill levels, including families.
